'''ât-b-h''' ('''katabah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yoficate|yoficate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-b-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yoficate|yoficate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-b-h
|-
! Lemma
| katabah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitabah|thitabah]] || [[word:jitabah|jitabah]] || [[word:shitabah|shitabah]] || [[word:kitabah|kitabah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutabah|thuthutabah]] || [[word:jujutabah|jujutabah]] || [[word:shushutabah|shushutabah]] || [[word:kukutabah|kukutabah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutabah|thutabah]] || [[word:jutabah|jutabah]] || [[word:shutabah|shutabah]] || [[word:kutabah|kutabah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutabah|thutabah]] || [[word:jutabah|jutabah]] || [[word:shutabah|shutabah]] || [[word:kutabah|kutabah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetabah|thetabah]] || [[word:jetabah|jetabah]] || [[word:shetabah|shetabah]] || [[word:ketabah|ketabah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotabah|thothotabah]] || [[word:jojotabah|jojotabah]] || [[word:shoshotabah|shoshotabah]] || [[word:kokotabah|kokotabah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotabah|thotabah]] || [[word:jotabah|jotabah]] || [[word:shotabah|shotabah]] || [[word:kotabah|kotabah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotabah|thotabah]] || [[word:jotabah|jotabah]] || [[word:shotabah|shotabah]] || [[word:kotabah|kotabah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtabah|thĂŠtabah]] || [[word:jĂŠtabah|jĂŠtabah]] || [[word:shĂŠtabah|shĂŠtabah]] || [[word:kĂŠtabah|kĂŠtabah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatabah|thathatabah]] || [[word:jajatabah|jajatabah]] || [[word:shashatabah|shashatabah]] || [[word:kakatabah|kakatabah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatabah|thatabah]] || [[word:jatabah|jatabah]] || [[word:shatabah|shatabah]] || [[word:katabah|katabah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatabah|thatabah]] || [[word:jatabah|jatabah]] || [[word:shatabah|shatabah]] || [[word:katabah|katabah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatabah|shatabah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatabah|goshatabah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatabah|gokishatabah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatabahnĂŒ|shatabahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatabahnknĂŒ|goshatabahnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatabahnĂŒ|gokishatabahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatabahshĂ«|shatabahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatabahnkshĂ«|goshatabahnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatabahshĂ«|gokishatabahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatabahro|shatabahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatabahnkro|goshatabahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatabahro|gokishatabahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatabahmu|shatabahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatabahnkmu|goshatabahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatabahmu|gokishatabahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatabahsher|shatabahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatabahnksher|goshatabahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatabahsher|gokishatabahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatabahng|shatabahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatabahnkng|goshatabahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatabahng|gokishatabahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatabahya|shatabahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatabahnkya|goshatabahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatabahya|gokishatabahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatabahyam|shatabahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatabahnkyam|goshatabahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatabahyam|gokishatabahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatabahnĂŒshĂ«|shatabahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatabahnknĂŒshĂ«|goshatabahnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatabahnĂŒshĂ«|gokishatabahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatabahnĂŒro|shatabahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatabahnknĂŒro|goshatabahnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatabahnĂŒro|gokishatabahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatabahnĂŒmu|shatabahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatabahnknĂŒmu|goshatabahnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatabahnĂŒmu|gokishatabahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatabahshĂ«nĂŒ|shatabahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatabahnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshatabahnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatabahshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishatabahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatabahshĂ«ro|shatabahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatabahnkshĂ«ro|goshatabahnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatabahshĂ«ro|gokishatabahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatabahshĂ«mu|shatabahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatabahnkshĂ«mu|goshatabahnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatabahshĂ«mu|gokishatabahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatabahronĂŒ|shatabahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatabahnkronĂŒ|goshatabahnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatabahronĂŒ|gokishatabahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatabahroshĂ«|shatabahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatabahnkroshĂ«|goshatabahnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatabahroshĂ«|gokishatabahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatabahromu|shatabahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatabahnkromu|goshatabahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatabahromu|gokishatabahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatabahmunĂŒ|shatabahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatabahnkmunĂŒ|goshatabahnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatabahmunĂŒ|gokishatabahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatabahmushĂ«|shatabahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatabahnkmushĂ«|goshatabahnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatabahmushĂ«|gokishatabahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatabahmuro|shatabahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatabahnkmuro|goshatabahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatabahmuro|gokishatabahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
